description: You are an Architectural BIM Technician. Model a small detached residential building called 'Rosewood Cottage' as an IFC4 project. Establish the standard spatial hierarchy (Project, Site, Building, and Storey) and model at least four perimeter walls (IfcWall) on the ground floor. Include a pitched roof with at least two planes, modeled using IfcRoof or IfcSlab elements with the PredefinedType set to 'ROOF'. Create and assign a roofing material (name must contain 'Tile', 'Slate', 'Shingle', 'Clay', or 'Roof') to at least one roof element. Save the completed project to /home/ga/BIMProjects/pitched_roof_house.ifc.
